Programs

Featured for this admission cycle

Industry-aligned courses from Manipal, Jain, and Sharda University Online.

View all programs
Amity UniversityPostgraduate

MBA - Amity University

A two-year MBA program focused on building advanced management, leadership, and business strategy skills for modern career growth.

2 Years • Full-time • Hybrid

View details
Amity UniversityIntegrated

Integrated BBA+MBA - Amity University

An integrated management pathway that combines undergraduate business fundamentals with postgraduate leadership and strategy training in one continuous program.

5 Years • Full-time • Hybrid

View details
Jain UniversityPostgraduate

MBA – Digital Business & Strategy

A two-year MBA program focused on digital business, growth strategy, and analytics, crafted with input from global tech and consulting companies.

2 Years • Full-time • Hybrid

View details
Jain UniversityCertification

Certification in Product Management

A fast-track program covering product discovery, roadmapping, experimentation, and stakeholder communication for aspiring PMs.

6 Months • Part-time • Online

View details
